# Vendored Frontend Libraries

- `elk.bundled.js`
  - Source: `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/elkjs@0.11.0/lib/elk.bundled.js`
  - License: Eclipse Public License 2.0, copied in `elkjs-LICENSE.md`
  - Usage: `tools/video-dag-canvas.html` uses this local copy for DAG layout so exported static HTML works offline.
- `cytoscape.min.js`
  - Source: `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/cytoscape@3.29.2/dist/cytoscape.min.js`
  - License: MIT, copied in `cytoscape-LICENSE.md`
  - Usage: `tools/video-dag-cytoscape.html` uses this local copy for a faster graph-first DAG viewer.
